Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Tree Service By Northwest to get the job done right.

“Tree Service By Northwest did an amazing job removing a large, dying maple from my backyard. The crew was professional, efficient, and very careful not to damage my fence or landscaping. Highly recommend!”

Maria S. Tree Removal
Jul 15, 2024

“I had two old stumps that were an eyesore in my front yard. Tree Service By Northwest came out and ground them down quickly and cleanly. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.”

David B. Stump Grinding
Aug 2, 2024

“Our apple tree was overgrown and not producing much fruit. Tree Service By Northwest pruned it expertly, and now it looks healthier than ever. Looking forward to a better harvest next year!”

Jessica K. Tree Pruning
Sep 10, 2024

“A huge branch fell on my roof during a storm. Tree Service By Northwest responded immediately and removed the branch safely and efficiently. They saved my roof from further damage!”

Tom H. Emergency Tree Service
Oct 28, 2024

“I was concerned about the health of my large oak tree. The arborist from Tree Service By Northwest provided a thorough assessment and gave me valuable advice on how to care for it. Very helpful!”

Susan L. Arborist Consultation
Nov 15, 2024

“After a recent windstorm, my yard was a mess. Tree Service By Northwest came out and cleared all the debris quickly and efficiently. They were a lifesaver!”

Robert M. Storm Damage Cleanup
Dec 1, 2024
Tree Service By Northwest

Trusted tree removal professionals serving Seattle, WA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
